## Safety / privacy checklist

- [ ] No real API keys, tokens, passkeys, passwords, or `.env` files
- [ ] No private family documents
- [ ] No children’s private data
- [ ] No real addresses or emergency routes
- [ ] No legal, financial, medical, or court documents
